title: OpenLux — Georeferenced public lighting asset management system with first-order installation photometric indices
description: Open-source platform for georeferenced management of public lighting parks, featuring a lightweight method for capturing installation condition at scale (aiming angle and ground material reflectance), first-order photometric indices (floor utilization, light pollution, relative luminance), photometric equipment catalog (Tier 2), and polygon-based spatial analysis via PostGIS. Includes source code, database migrations, comprehensive documentation, and a reference implementation case study. Designed for reproducibility, auditability, and deployment in any city.
